info.title: Nomia Signature API
info.description:
Welcome to the Nomia API.

This API provides access to our system, which you can use to integrate applications, automate workflows, or build custom tools.

get.description: Find all attachments for an envelope

post.description: Create a new attachment for an envelope
Update an existing attachment
Delete an attachment from an envelope
Create multiple envelope items for an envelope
Update multiple envelope items for an envelope
Delete an envelope item from an envelope

get.description: Download an envelope item by its ID

parameters.name: envelopeItemId
parameters.description: The ID of the envelope item to download.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the envelope item to download. "signed" returns the completed document with signatures, "original" returns the original uploaded document.

get.description: Returns an envelope recipient given an ID

post.description: Create multiple recipients for an envelope
Update multiple recipients for an envelope
Delete an envelope recipient

get.description: Returns an envelope field given an ID

post.description: Create multiple fields for an envelope
Update multiple envelope fields for an envelope
Delete an envelope field

get.description: Find envelopes based on search criteria

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The pagination page number, starts at 1.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter envelopes by type (DOCUMENT or TEMPLATE).

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: Filter envelopes by the template ID used to create it.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter envelopes by how it was created.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter envelopes by the current status.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Filter envelopes by folder ID.

parameters.name: orderByDirection
parameters.description: Sort direction.

get.description: Find audit logs based on a search criteria

parameters.name: envelopeId
parameters.description: Envelope ID

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The pagination page number, starts at 1.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

get.description: Returns an envelope given an ID

post.description: Retrieve multiple envelopes by their IDs
Create an envelope using form data.

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Create a document envelope from a template envelope. Upload custom files to replace the template PDFs and map them to specific envelope items using identifiers.

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a
EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Duplicate an envelope with all its settings
Send the envelope to recipients based on your distribution method

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Redistribute the envelope to the provided recipients who have not actioned the envelope. Will use the distribution method set in the envelope

get.description: Returns a document given an ID

post.description: Retrieve multiple documents by their IDs

get.description: Find documents based on a search criteria

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The pagination page number, starts at 1.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: Filter documents by the template ID used to create it.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter documents by how it was created.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter documents by the current status

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Filter documents by folder ID

post.description: Create a document using form data.

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a
EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Send the document out to recipients based on your distribution method

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Redistribute the document to the provided recipients who have not actioned the document. Will use the distribution method set in the document

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The ID of the document to download.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the document to download. "signed" returns the completed document with signatures, "original" returns the original uploaded document.

get.description: Get a pre-signed download URL for the original or signed version of a document.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The ID of the document to download.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the document to download. "signed" returns the completed document with signatures, "original" returns the original uploaded document.

get.description: Get a pre-signed download URL for the original or signed version of a document

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The ID of the document to download.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the document to download. "signed" returns the completed document with signatures, "original" returns the original uploaded document.

post.description: You will need to upload the PDF to the provided URL returned. Note: Once V2 API is released, this will be removed since we will allow direct uploads, instead of using an upload URL.

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Create a new attachment for a document
Update an existing attachment
Delete an attachment from a document

get.description: Find all attachments for a document
Returns a single field. If you want to retrieve all the fields for a document, use the "Get Document" endpoint.

post.description: Create a single field for a document.
Create multiple fields for a document.
Update a single field for a document.
Update multiple fields for a document.
Create a single field for a template.

get.description: Returns a single field. If you want to retrieve all the fields for a template, use the "Get Template" endpoint.

post.description: Create multiple fields for a template.
Update a single field for a template.
Update multiple fields for a template.

get.description: Find folders based on a search criteria

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The pagination page number, starts at 1.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

post.description: Creates a new folder in your team
Updates an existing folder
Deletes an existing folder

get.description: Returns the ID and name of all folders belonging to the team. Requires a team API token.
Returns a single recipient. If you want to retrieve all the recipients for a document, use the "Get Document" endpoint.

post.description: Create a single recipient for a document.
Create multiple recipients for a document.
Update a single recipient for a document.
Update multiple recipients for a document.

get.description: Returns a single recipient. If you want to retrieve all the recipients for a template, use the "Get Template" endpoint.

post.description: Create a single recipient for a template.
Create multiple recipients for a template.
Update a single recipient for a template.
Update multiple recipients for a template.

get.description: Find templates based on a search criteria

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The pagination page number, starts at 1.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter templates by type.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The ID of the folder to filter templates by.

post.description: Retrieve multiple templates by their IDs
Create a new template

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: You will need to upload the PDF to the provided URL returned. Note: Once V2 API is released, this will be removed since we will allow direct uploads, instead of using an upload URL.

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a
EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Use the template to create a document

enum: EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy hh:mm a

post.description: Create a direct link for a template
Delete a direct link for a template
Enable or disable a direct link for a template
Creates a presign token for embedding operations with configurable expiration time
Verifies a presign token for embedding operations and returns the associated API token
